msg: warning: Variable p is used uninitialized!
reasoning: Line 28 is 'p += n - 1;' inside the while loop's if-branch. Same uninitialized pointer 'p' bug as FAMILY_63: p is declared at line 11 without initialization and used here before being assigned a valid address. Same presence condition (MDEV_CONF && MDEV_RENAME && MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP) matching the nested #ifdef guards. This is an additional use location of the same known vbdb bug (b62bd7b261b). Known bug, correctly constrained.
